tables: Atal Bihari Vajpayee Medical University ABVMU UP CNET Counselling 2026

Atal Bihari Vajpayee Medical University (ABVMU), Uttar Pradesh has released the UP Common Nursing Entrance Test UPCNET Notification 2026. Those Candidates are Interested to the Following Exam Can Apply Online From 28/03/2026 to 20/05/2026.candidates should read the UPCNET 2026 information brochure for all the information related to the UPCNET exam like syllabus, eligibility, age limit, fees, B.SC Nursing, Post B.SC Nursing and M.Sc Nursing Courses, information and other types of information and then apply.

Atal Bihari Vajpayee Medical University ( ABVMU) , Uttar Pradesh Uttar Pradesh Common Nursing Entrance Test CNET 2026 UP CNET Exam 2026: Short Details of Notification Sarkari Result® | WWW.SARKARIRESULT.COM

Important Dates Application Begin : 28/03/2026 Last Date for Apply Online : 20/05/2026 Pay Exam Fee Last Date : 20/05/2026 Correction Date : 13-20 May 2026 UPCNET 2026 Exam Date : 06 June 2026 Admit Card Available  : 31/05/2026 Answer Key Available : 09/06/2026 Result Date : 13/06/2026 Counselling Start Date : 14/06/2026

Application Fee General / OBC / EWS: 3000/- SC / ST / PH : 2000/- Pay the Exam Fee Through Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking Only. Counselling Registration Fee : 500/- (NON-Refundable) Counselling Security Fee : 5000/-
UP Common Nursing Admission Test 2026 : Age Limit as on 31/12/2026 Minimum Age : 17 Years. Age Relaxation Details Read the UP Common Nursing CNET 2026 Rules.
UP CNET 2026 Entrance Exam : Admissions Details
10+2 Intermediate with PCB Subject and Passed in English Individually from Any Recognized Board. Minimum 45% Marks.
10+2 Intermediate Exam from Any Recognized Board in India. GNM Certificate and Registered as State Nurses Registration Council. More Eligibility Details Read the Notification
M.SC Nursing / Nurse Practitioner in Critical Care NPCC 2 Years

Registered Nurse and Registered Midwife with Any Nursing Registration Council. B.SC Nursing / Post Basic B.Sc Nursing with 55% Marks. 1 Year Work Experience Clinical OR Teaching After Basic B.SC Nursing More Eligibility Details Read the Notification
Uttar Pradesh CNET 2026 : Participating Institute / University All Nursing Colleges Affiliated to ABVMU SGPGIMS, Lucknow KGMU, Lucknow RMLIMS, Lucknow UPUMS, Saifai LLRM, Meerut

Sarkari Result® : How to Fill UP CNET Online Form 2026 Cast Certificate Instruction : OBC and EWS certificate should be issued after 01 April 2026. Photo Instruction : The photograph should be full face, from front, with white background and without spectacles along with the name of the candidate and date of photograph should be written on the photograph. Uttar Pradesh Common Nursing Entrance Test CNET 2026 Notification Released. Candidate Can Apply From 28/03/2026 to 20/05/2026. Candidate Read the Notification Before Apply the Admission Application Form in Atal Bihari Vajpayee Medical University, ABVMU Lucknow , K.G. Medical University, U.P., KGMU Lucknow, Dr. R.M.L. Institute of Medical Sciences, RML Lucknow, UPUMS and All Govt. & Private Universities / Deemed Universities of U.P Kindly Check and Collect the All Document – Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details. Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Recruitment Form – Photo, Sign, ID Proof, Etc. Before Submit the Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Column Carefully. If Candidate Required to Paying the Application Fee Must Submit. If You have Not the Required Application Fees Your Form is Not Completed. Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form.
